html.value:
The chicken is still in your fridge. ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
 

Founding Family

Sunday. $180 at the grocery store. A real plan.

Wednesday 6:22 PM. Kids asking. You open DoorDash. The chicken thighs are still in the fridge.

You didn't waste $47 on DoorDash.
You wasted the $180 that had nowhere to go.

The groceries were right. The intention was right. There was just nothing to connect Sunday's plan to Wednesday's fridge. No bridge between what you bought and what actually became dinner.

That is what $111 a month looks like. Not bad decisions. Not overspending. Just a gap that has never had a system to close it.

The problem was never you. The system was disconnected.

easyChef Pro is that system. It closes the loop between what you buy and what actually becomes dinner — so Wednesday looks like the plan you made on Sunday.

Stop the Sunday → Wednesday leak.
Permanently.

5,000 founding spots  ·  $7.99/month locked forever

Claim my founding spot →

Free to join. No credit card. Early access July 1.

From the kitchen

Talk soon,

Taylor

Founder, easyChef Pro

P.S. The founding price is $7.99 forever. After the first 5,000 spots it goes to $19.99. Every week you wait is another DoorDash Wednesday.

You're receiving this because you joined the easyChef Pro waitlist.

Digital Galactica Labs  ·  easyChef Pro  ·  Unsubscribe  ·  Privacy
